ocean.heroSubtitle2: Small-group private ocean tours where even beginners feel at ease.
ocean.activitiesTitle: Four ways to meet the sea
ocean.activitiesIntro: Dive deep, get certified, feel the catch, or float on the surface — swipe to choose.

tagline.snorkeling: For the whole family, a coral garden at the surface
tagline.diving: Hold your breath, into the blue

desc.snorkeling: A life vest and guide are always with you, so kids and seniors feel safe. The easiest way to meet the Blue Cave's mystical light, coral, and tropical fish — right from the surface.
desc.diving: No certification needed — a pro instructor accompanies you 1:2. From the Blue Cave's mystical light to the clarity of Kerama Blue, cruise Okinawa's signature points by boat.
desc.padi: Internationally certified PADI instructors guide you. From your first certification to pro specialties, grow safely step by step.
desc.fishing: Rich fishing grounds nurtured by the Kuroshio Current. From easy trial fishing to big-game trolling for mahi-mahi, gear and bait are all included.

ocean.assuranceTitle: Leave it to us with confidence
ocean.assurance1Desc: Up to 6 per team. The instructor cares for every guest's breathing to the end.
ocean.assurance2Desc: Internationally certified instructors and dive accident insurance for every guest keep you safe.
ocean.assurance3Desc: From booking to briefing to underwater hand signals, a guide is with you throughout.
ocean.assurance4Desc: Original underwater photos provided, plus free pickup from major accommodations.
ocean.blogEmpty: No stories yet. We're preparing our first one.
ocean.t1Quote: It was my first dive, but the instructor held my hand the whole time so I wasn't scared at all. The Blue Cave light was absolutely magical!
ocean.t2Quote: I earned my Open Water certification step by step. From theory to open-water practice, the safety care was truly thorough.
ocean.t3Quote: Went big-game trolling and caught four mahi-mahi! They sliced it into sashimi right on the boat — an unforgettable day.
ocean.reserveIntro: Check available dates and send an inquiry — we'll reply within 24 hours with a tailored plan and quote.

tourDetail.preparing: Details are being prepared. Please use the button below to ask about dates and a quote — we'll get back to you within 24 hours.

medical.title: Medical Check
medical.intro1: This medical check is a required step for your safe underwater experience. If any item below applies to you, the tour may not be possible for safety reasons.
medical.intro2: If you provide false information and the tour cannot proceed on the day or an accident occurs, the responsibility is yours and the deposit is non-refundable (no fault of OKINITY).
medical.intro3: Expand each section to read it, then check 'None apply' if nothing applies to you.
medical.noneApply: None of the above apply to me
medical.progressHint: Please expand and confirm every section

groups.title: Flying after diving
items: I have no plans to board a flight within 18 hours after scuba diving. (Not applicable to snorkeling tours — please just confirm.)

groups.title: Ears · nose · sinuses
items: I currently have no ear inflammation or pain.
I have never had or been diagnosed with ear disease (such as otitis media or externa), hearing loss, or balance/equilibrium problems.
I have never had ear or sinus surgery.
I currently have no cold, nasal congestion, sinusitis, or bronchitis.

groups.title: Respiratory · lungs
items: I have no history of circulatory disease, severe allergic reactions (including hay fever), or lung disease.
I have never had a pneumothorax or any respiratory surgery.
I have never had or been diagnosed with asthma, emphysema, or tuberculosis.

groups.title: Cardiovascular · blood · metabolic
items: I have no heart disease, no history of heart attack, and have never had heart or vascular surgery.
I have no history of high blood pressure or angina, and have never taken medication to control blood pressure.
No immediate family member has a history of heart attack or stroke.
I have no bleeding disorder or other blood disorder.
I have never had or been diagnosed with diabetes or a diabetes-related condition.

groups.title: Neurological · mental · medication
items: I am not taking any medication that carries a warning of impaired physical or mental ability.
I have no behavioral or mental health disorder, psychological condition, or nervous system disorder.
I have no history of seizures, blackouts, fainting, convulsions, or epilepsy, and take no medication to prevent them.

groups.title: Other
items: I am not pregnant and there is no possibility of pregnancy.
I have never had ostomy (stoma) surgery.
I have no history of functional problems in an arm or leg following an accident, fracture, or surgery.
I have no history of fear of enclosed or semi-enclosed spaces, or of panic attacks.
